creator: max@stucchi.ch
text:
I found a minor typo in the porters handbook:

Index: flavors/chapter.xml
===================================================================
--- flavors/chapter.xml	(revision 52004)
+++ flavors/chapter.xml	(working copy)
@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@

     <para>Another example could be, a port can have a
       <application>GTK</application> flavor and a
-      <application>QT</application> flavor, depending on which tookit
+      <application>QT</application> flavor, depending on which toolkit
       it uses.</para> </sect1>

   <sect1 xml:id="flavors-using">

Ciao!
